article_items.title: Company : TechCrunch AI
article_items.description: [MEDIUM] Apple approves Poke as the first AI agent on its Messages for Business platform Company : TechCrunch AI Summary : Poke, the startup that lets people use AI agents through simple text messages, has become the first AI agent approved for Apple’s Messages for Business platform.
